## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and scoped
- [ ] I updated documentation if behavior changed
- [ ] I added or updated tests if applicable
- [ ] I ran `cargo fmt --all`
- [ ] I ran `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] I ran `cargo test --workspace --all-features`

## Notes

Add anything reviewers should pay attention to.
